label: FACIS Simulation — Kafka Adapter
info:
ORCE-native Kafka adapter for the simulation runtime.

Receives the unified tick envelope from the Feeds tab via
`sim.envelope` link-in, splits per feed type, and publishes to the
9 Stackable-Kafka topics with mTLS.

Topic conventions preserved from the legacy facis-simulation-cluster.json:
  sim.smart_energy.{meter,pv,weather,price,consumer}
  sim.smart_city.{light,traffic,event,weather}

Prerequisite: node-red-contrib-rdkafka installed via the ORCE PVC
(see services/simulation/orce/Dockerfile).

name: ORCE-native Kafka adapter (envelope → 9 topics)
info:
Driven by the Feeds tab via link-in `sim.envelope`.
Topic split + rdkafka producers identical to the legacy
facis-simulation-cluster.json HTTP-driven flow.

name: Validate Schema
Split Feeds
